notes: Chunk 67 DONE (Template B, Tier B, 25 new routes): Lebanon to AT/BE/CZ/DK/FI/HU/IE/IT/NO/PL/PT/SE/CH (13) and Rwanda to AT/BE/CZ/DK/FI/HU/IT/NO/PL/PT/SE/CH (12). Both origins are EU-unlisted third countries: full FAVN titre test + 90-day wait from blood draw (Switzerland: 3-month wait plus FSVO advance import permission). Destination-specific quirks featured: Norway mandatory dog tapeworm treatment, Ireland TRACES pre-notification, Italy no national breed ban (repealed 2009), Switzerland FSVO advance permission for high-risk-country pets. Lebanon export via Ministry of Agriculture (BEY, export permit required); Rwanda export via RAB (KGL, no export permit). Blog Day 25 DONE: uk-pet-passports-2026-guide (Dr. Sarah Okafor) - what replaced the UK pet passport post-Brexit, how the Animal Health Certificate works, cost, timeline, Northern Ireland nuance. Next: Chunk 68 (Template C, Tier B).

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
